themes.label: Worship
themes.summary: This chapter gives prominence to praise, worship, thanksgiving, or blessing God’s name. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 6 verses. Commentary leans on "This verse begins the enumeration of instruments and reasons for praise: 'Praise him for his...". Word-study detail reinforces "עֻזּֽוֹ׃: of his power - strength in various applications (force, security, majesty, praise)".
